help.howToPlay: Divide among children or into bags — find how many per group and how many remain, then tap "Check Division".
help.scoring: Correct answer +30, time bonus up to +20, streak of 5 correct +25. After 3 failed attempts the solution is shown.
help.rewards: Coins are awarded based on how many questions you answered correctly, accuracy, streaks, and difficulty level - even if the game ended due to mistakes.
help.tip: Watch whether the task asks per child or full bags.
